resultList.dtldesc: Discover a world of luxury and convenience with this premium 2 BHK apartment located in the prestigious Urbanrise On Cloud 33 project in Bachupally, Hyderabad. This road-side property offers an elevated lifestyle with over 100 amenities, making it a highly desirable choice for those seeking a modern and vibrant residential community in one of the citys fastest-growing corridors.Property SpecificationsThis newly constructed, west-facing apartment spans a super area of 1110 sq. ft and is situated on the 12th floor of a magnificent 33-storey tower. The unfurnished unit features two well-proportioned bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, and a private balcony that offers a pleasant view of the manicured gardens and park below. An additional study room provides extra space, making it perfect for those working from home or needing a quiet retreat. The flooring is elegantly finished with marble, adding a touch of sophistication to the entire space. The property is Vaastu compliant and has received approval from the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation, ensuring a harmonious and legally sound living environment.FacilitiesUrbanrise On Cloud 33 provides an extensive array of world-class facilities designed to cater to every lifestyle need. Residents have access to a massive clubhouse, a swimming pool, a gymnasium, and a mini cinema theatre. For sports enthusiasts, the project includes outdoor tennis courts and a half basketball court. The community is secured with 24-hour security, CCTV surveillance, and an intercom facility. Essential services like power backup, water storage, and a dedicated maintenance staff are also provided. Additional conveniences include a cafeteria, banquet hall, piped gas connection, and internetWi-Fi connectivity, ensuring a seamless and comfortable urban living experience.LocalityThe property is strategically located at the Bachupally X Roads, offering unparalleled connectivity to major landmarks. Renowned educational institutions such as Delhi Public School and Sri Chaitanya Degree College are in close proximity, making it an ideal location for families. Healthcare needs are well-served by R3 Hospitals and Reach Superspeciality Hospital, both located nearby. For shopping and daily essentials, the Bachupally Centre and 7 Hills Super Market are just a short distance away. The area is well-connected by public transport, with the Bachupally Bus Stop nearby, providing easy access to the rest of Hyderabad. This vibrant neighbourhood combines essential urban amenities with a growing commercial presence, making it a prime residential address.
